faqs.question: How much does drain fly treatment cost in Maspeth?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment services in Maspeth range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, the number of drains affected, and the size of your property. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most customers see significant reduction in drain fly activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 1-2 weeks as we target both adult flies and larvae breeding in your drains. We include follow-up visits to ensure total eradication.

faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Maspeth homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic buildup inside drains, pipes, and other moist areas. Common causes include infrequently used drains, leaking pipes, clogged sewage lines, and moisture accumulation in basements. Maspeth's older plumbing infrastructure can be particularly susceptible to these issues.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day drain fly treatment in Maspeth?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency drain fly treatment services throughout Maspeth and Queens. Our team is typically available 7 days a week and can respond quickly to urgent infestations in both residential and commercial properties.
